records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you say the connection failed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you say the connection failed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you say the connection failed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. The energy circulation in the amplification tunnel has completely stopped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. The energy circulation in the amplification tunnel has completely stopped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. The energy circulation in the amplification tunnel has completely stopped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the tunnel is blocked, does that mean something got lodged in the middle?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the tunnel is blocked, does that mean something got lodged in the middle?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the tunnel is blocked, does that mean something got lodged in the middle?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We just sent a detection drone. It picked up high-density energy spreading from the tunnel's midpoint.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We just sent a detection drone. It picked up high-density energy spreading from the tunnel's midpoint.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We just sent a detection drone. It picked up high-density energy spreading from the tunnel's midpoint.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like the tunnel is being interfered with from the outside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like the tunnel is being interfered with from the outside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like the tunnel is being interfered with from the outside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then the other side must be having trouble too. Could it be a stray C.O.?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then the other side must be having trouble too. Could it be a stray C.O.?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then the other side must be having trouble too. Could it be a stray C.O.?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Probably not. Dimensional pressure isn't something that can just punch through somewhere that isn't an entry point.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Probably not. Dimensional pressure isn't something that can just punch through somewhere that isn't an entry point.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Probably not. Dimensional pressure isn't something that can just punch through somewhere that isn't an entry point.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If something big enough to block the tunnel appeared, we should assume there's deliberate intent behind it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If something big enough to block the tunnel appeared, we should assume there's deliberate intent behind it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If something big enough to block the tunnel appeared, we should assume there's deliberate intent behind it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thagirion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thagirion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She has the roots of the Golden Tree that can cross anywhere, and she has every reason to interfere with you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She has the roots of the Golden Tree that can cross anywhere, and she has every reason to interfere with you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She has the roots of the Golden Tree that can cross anywhere, and she has every reason to interfere with you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the inflow of Imaginary Energy meant to connect the past and present cut off, the output is dropping.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the inflow of Imaginary Energy meant to connect the past and present cut off, the output is dropping.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the inflow of Imaginary Energy meant to connect the past and present cut off, the output is dropping.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, the tunnel connection itself won't last much longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, the tunnel connection itself won't last much longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, the tunnel connection itself won't last much longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happens to the people in the past if the tunnel is severed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happens to the people in the past if the tunnel is severed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happens to the people in the past if the tunnel is severed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They'll either be erased because they can't withstand the phase difference, or if they endure it, they'll be flung into imaginary space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They'll either be erased because they can't withstand the phase difference, or if they endure it, they'll be flung into imaginary space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They'll either be erased because they can't withstand the phase difference, or if they endure it, they'll be flung into imaginary space.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To solve this, we'll need to inject enough additional energy to expand the tunnel enough to relieve the bottleneck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To solve this, we'll need to inject enough additional energy to expand the tunnel enough to relieve the bottleneck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To solve this, we'll need to inject enough additional energy to expand the tunnel enough to relieve the bottleneck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible. How are we supposed to secure even more energy than we already have?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible. How are we supposed to secure even more energy than we already have?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible. How are we supposed to secure even more energy than we already have?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can do it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can do it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can do it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Miss Shin Jia?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Miss Shin Jia?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Miss Shin Jia?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We just increase the number of Alternium filters connected to the Well by fivefold, no, tenfold, and expand the amplification tunnel. That should solve the problem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We just increase the number of Alternium filters connected to the Well by fivefold, no, tenfold, and expand the amplification tunnel. That should solve the problem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We just increase the number of Alternium filters connected to the Well by fivefold, no, tenfold, and expand the amplification tunnel. That should solve the problem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It would take months just to double them. You're saying that's possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It would take months just to double them. You're saying that's possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It would take months just to double them. You're saying that's possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, it's not that difficult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, it's not that difficult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, it's not that difficult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you're not going to mention that using the fairy's power so recklessly will destroy your mind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you're not going to mention that using the fairy's power so recklessly will destroy your mind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you're not going to mention that using the fairy's power so recklessly will destroy your mind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If someone who wanted to protect the world had this power... anyone would do the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If someone who wanted to protect the world had this power... anyone would do the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If someone who wanted to protect the world had this power... anyone would do the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That would solve the immediate bottleneck.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That would solve the immediate bottleneck.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That would solve the immediate bottleneck.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But no matter how many times we expand the tunnel, for Thagirion, it would only mean sending in that many more of her forces.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But no matter how many times we expand the tunnel, for Thagirion, it would only mean sending in that many more of her forces.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But no matter how many times we expand the tunnel, for Thagirion, it would only mean sending in that many more of her forces.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if this turns into a war of attrition, that overwhelmingly favors her, since our numbers are limited.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if this turns into a war of attrition, that overwhelmingly favors her, since our numbers are limited.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if this turns into a war of attrition, that overwhelmingly favors her, since our numbers are limited.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we have one card Thagirion doesn't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we have one card Thagirion doesn't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we have one card Thagirion doesn't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I would like to stake everything on that possibility.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I would like to stake everything on that possibility.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I would like to stake everything on that possibility.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Something Thagirion doesn't have...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Something Thagirion doesn't have...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Something Thagirion doesn't have...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Irene.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Irene.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Irene.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we go find the Coffin of Thagirion from twenty years ago, your Panorama will be prepared there, won't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we go find the Coffin of Thagirion from twenty years ago, your Panorama will be prepared there, won't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we go find the Coffin of Thagirion from twenty years ago, your Panorama will be prepared there, won't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's true, but... didn't you say the past and present can't interfere with each other because of the rules? Then wouldn't breaking it now be pointless?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's true, but... didn't you say the past and present can't interfere with each other because of the rules? Then wouldn't breaking it now be pointless?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's true, but... didn't you say the past and present can't interfere with each other because of the rules? Then wouldn't breaking it now be pointless?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not suggesting we destroy it. I'm saying we retrieve it and make use of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not suggesting we destroy it. I'm saying we retrieve it and make use of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not suggesting we destroy it. I'm saying we retrieve it and make use of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a medium to expand the amplification tunnel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a medium to expand the amplification tunnel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a medium to expand the amplification tunnel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Use Panorama on the amplification tunnel...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Use Panorama on the amplification tunnel...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Use Panorama on the amplification tunnel...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Certainly, if the mirror can use both ends of the passage as its subjects, then we could duplicate the amplification tunnel over and over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Certainly, if the mirror can use both ends of the passage as its subjects, then we could duplicate the amplification tunnel over and over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Certainly, if the mirror can use both ends of the passage as its subjects, then we could duplicate the amplification tunnel over and over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if the amplification tunnel keeps multiplying, then no matter how vast the Demon Lord's army is, it won't be able to block it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if the amplification tunnel keeps multiplying, then no matter how vast the Demon Lord's army is, it won't be able to block it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if the amplification tunnel keeps multiplying, then no matter how vast the Demon Lord's army is, it won't be able to block it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how are we supposed to get that Panorama? We have no way to contact Team Moon and tell them they need it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how are we supposed to get that Panorama? We have no way to contact Team Moon and tell them they need it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how are we supposed to get that Panorama? We have no way to contact Team Moon and tell them they need it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty paces behind the Well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty paces behind the Well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty paces behind the Well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you dig into the ground around there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you dig into the ground around there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you dig into the ground around there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is... a recorder. The design feels really analog.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is... a recorder. The design feels really analog.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is... a recorder. The design feels really analog.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
This is Hilde
8g I mean, Team Moon.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
This is Hilde
8g I mean, Team Moon.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
This is Hilde
8g I mean, Team Moon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A transmission? But the signal still shouldn't be able to get through. How is this happening?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A transmission? But the signal still shouldn't be able to get through. How is this happening?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A transmission? But the signal still shouldn't be able to get through. How is this happening?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as the Administrator feared, Thagirion is interfering. So we were forced to use the Artifact we'd kept in reserve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as the Administrator feared, Thagirion is interfering. So we were forced to use the Artifact we'd kept in reserve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as the Administrator feared, Thagirion is interfering. So we were forced to use the Artifact we'd kept in reserve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the Time Capsule Yanikka had.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the Time Capsule Yanikka had.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the Time Capsule Yanikka had.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This Time Capsule is a one-way transmission device that can't receive replies.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This Time Capsule is a one-way transmission device that can't receive replies.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This Time Capsule is a one-way transmission device that can't receive replies.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The difference between it and an ordinary recorder is that, from the moment it is buried in the ground until someone observes it, it exists simultaneously across all time periods.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The difference between it and an ordinary recorder is that, from the moment it is buried in the ground until someone observes it, it exists simultaneously across all time periods.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The difference between it and an ordinary recorder is that, from the moment it is buried in the ground until someone observes it, it exists simultaneously across all time periods.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that means we can communicate freely with the past even without going through the Well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that means we can communicate freely with the past even without going through the Well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that means we can communicate freely with the past even without going through the Well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's insanely useful, isn't it?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's insanely useful, isn't it?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's insanely useful, isn't it?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The problem is the limit on how many times it can be used.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The problem is the limit on how many times it can be used.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The problem is the limit on how many times it can be used.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It may be possible to be observed in any time period, but the moment it is observed once, the possibility of it being observed in that time period is eliminated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It may be possible to be observed in any time period, but the moment it is observed once, the possibility of it being observed in that time period is eliminated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It may be possible to be observed in any time period, but the moment it is observed once, the possibility of it being observed in that time period is eliminated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, keep in mind that both sides can only send a single message.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, keep in mind that both sides can only send a single message.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, keep in mind that both sides can only send a single message.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We have currently completed and activated the Great Well, but the amplification tunnel has been blocked by one of Thagirion's tricks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We have currently completed and activated the Great Well, but the amplification tunnel has been blocked by one of Thagirion's tricks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We have currently completed and activated the Great Well, but the amplification tunnel has been blocked by one of Thagirion's tricks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell us how to respond, and we'll follow your instructions from this side.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell us how to respond, and we'll follow your instructions from this side.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell us how to respond, and we'll follow your instructions from this side.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all buried!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all buried!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all buried!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we really bury it in the ground like this, will the Boss actually see it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we really bury it in the ground like this, will the Boss actually see it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we really bury it in the ground like this, will the Boss actually see it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was his plan from the start. If they noticed the abnormal reaction in the amplification tunnel from that side, they'll check.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was his plan from the start. If they noticed the abnormal reaction in the amplification tunnel from that side, they'll check.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was his plan from the start. If they noticed the abnormal reaction in the amplification tunnel from that side, they'll check.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So the time really came to use that Time Capsule...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So the time really came to use that Time Capsule...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So the time really came to use that Time Capsule...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even when I first heard how to use it, I wondered why we were bringing such a troublesome Artifact along.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even when I first heard how to use it, I wondered why we were bringing such a troublesome Artifact along.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even when I first heard how to use it, I wondered why we were bringing such a troublesome Artifact along.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The one who told me about the time machine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The one who told me about the time machine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The one who told me about the time machine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That person probably knows Felix somehow. They smelled similar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That person probably knows Felix somehow. They smelled similar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That person probably knows Felix somehow. They smelled similar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...We may be dancing in the palm of their hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...We may be dancing in the palm of their hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...We may be dancing in the palm of their hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What was that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What was that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What was that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, make sure your Watches are fully stocked with Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, make sure your Watches are fully stocked with Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, make sure your Watches are fully stocked with Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what decision Team Sun makes, we'll have to break through the dimensional tunnel ourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what decision Team Sun makes, we'll have to break through the dimensional tunnel ourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what decision Team Sun makes, we'll have to break through the dimensional tunnel ourselves.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Irene.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we go find the Coffin of Thagirion from twenty years ago, your Panorama will be prepared there, won't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we go find the Coffin of Thagirion from twenty years ago, your Panorama will be prepared there, won't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we go find the Coffin of Thagirion from twenty years ago, your Panorama will be prepared there, won't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's true, but... didn't you say the past and present can't interfere with each other because of the rules? Then wouldn't breaking it now be pointless?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's true, but... didn't you say the past and present can't interfere with each other because of the rules? Then wouldn't breaking it now be pointless?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's true, but... didn't you say the past and present can't interfere with each other because of the rules? Then wouldn't breaking it now be pointless?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not suggesting we destroy it. I'm saying we retrieve it and make use of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not suggesting we destroy it. I'm saying we retrieve it and make use of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not suggesting we destroy it. I'm saying we retrieve it and make use of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As a medium to expand the amplification tunnel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As a medium to expand the amplification tunnel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As a medium to expand the amplification tunnel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Use Panorama on the amplification tunnel...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Use Panorama on the amplification tunnel...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Use Panorama on the amplification tunnel...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Certainly, if the mirror can use both ends of the passage as its subjects, then we could duplicate the amplification tunnel over and over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Certainly, if the mirror can use both ends of the passage as its subjects, then we could duplicate the amplification tunnel over and over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Certainly, if the mirror can use both ends of the passage as its subjects, then we could duplicate the amplification tunnel over and over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if the amplification tunnel keeps multiplying, then no matter how vast the Demon Lord's army is, it won't be able to block it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if the amplification tunnel keeps multiplying, then no matter how vast the Demon Lord's army is, it won't be able to block it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if the amplification tunnel keeps multiplying, then no matter how vast the Demon Lord's army is, it won't be able to block it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But how are we supposed to get that Panorama? We have no way to contact Team Moon and tell them they need it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But how are we supposed to get that Panorama? We have no way to contact Team Moon and tell them they need it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But how are we supposed to get that Panorama? We have no way to contact Team Moon and tell them they need it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty paces behind the Well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty paces behind the Well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty paces behind the Well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would you dig into the ground around there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would you dig into the ground around there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would you dig into the ground around there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is... a recorder. The design feels really analog.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is... a recorder. The design feels really analog.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is... a recorder. The design feels really analog.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...?

root.m_Talk_ENG:
This is Hilde
8g I mean, Team Moon.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
This is Hilde
8g I mean, Team Moon.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
This is Hilde
8g I mean, Team Moon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A transmission? But the signal still shouldn't be able to get through. How is this happening?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A transmission? But the signal still shouldn't be able to get through. How is this happening?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A transmission? But the signal still shouldn't be able to get through. How is this happening?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as the Administrator feared, Thagirion is interfering. So we were forced to use the Artifact we'd kept in reserve.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as the Administrator feared, Thagirion is interfering. So we were forced to use the Artifact we'd kept in reserve.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as the Administrator feared, Thagirion is interfering. So we were forced to use the Artifact we'd kept in reserve.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's the Time Capsule Yanikka had.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's the Time Capsule Yanikka had.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's the Time Capsule Yanikka had.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This Time Capsule is a one-way transmission device that can't receive replies.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This Time Capsule is a one-way transmission device that can't receive replies.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This Time Capsule is a one-way transmission device that can't receive replies.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The difference between it and an ordinary recorder is that, from the moment it is buried in the ground until someone observes it, it exists simultaneously across all time periods.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The difference between it and an ordinary recorder is that, from the moment it is buried in the ground until someone observes it, it exists simultaneously across all time periods.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The difference between it and an ordinary recorder is that, from the moment it is buried in the ground until someone observes it, it exists simultaneously across all time periods.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that means we can communicate freely with the past even without going through the Well?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that means we can communicate freely with the past even without going through the Well?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that means we can communicate freely with the past even without going through the Well?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's insanely useful, isn't it?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's insanely useful, isn't it?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's insanely useful, isn't it?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The problem is the limit on how many times it can be used.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The problem is the limit on how many times it can be used.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The problem is the limit on how many times it can be used.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It may be possible to be observed in any time period, but the moment it is observed once, the possibility of it being observed in that time period is eliminated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It may be possible to be observed in any time period, but the moment it is observed once, the possibility of it being observed in that time period is eliminated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It may be possible to be observed in any time period, but the moment it is observed once, the possibility of it being observed in that time period is eliminated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In other words, keep in mind that both sides can only send a single message.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In other words, keep in mind that both sides can only send a single message.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In other words, keep in mind that both sides can only send a single message.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We have currently completed and activated the Great Well, but the amplification tunnel has been blocked by one of Thagirion's tricks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We have currently completed and activated the Great Well, but the amplification tunnel has been blocked by one of Thagirion's tricks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We have currently completed and activated the Great Well, but the amplification tunnel has been blocked by one of Thagirion's tricks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tell us how to respond, and we'll follow your instructions from this side.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tell us how to respond, and we'll follow your instructions from this side.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tell us how to respond, and we'll follow your instructions from this side.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all buried!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all buried!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all buried!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we really bury it in the ground like this, will the Boss actually see it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we really bury it in the ground like this, will the Boss actually see it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we really bury it in the ground like this, will the Boss actually see it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was his plan from the start. If they noticed the abnormal reaction in the amplification tunnel from that side, they'll check.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was his plan from the start. If they noticed the abnormal reaction in the amplification tunnel from that side, they'll check.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was his plan from the start. If they noticed the abnormal reaction in the amplification tunnel from that side, they'll check.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So the time really came to use that Time Capsule...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So the time really came to use that Time Capsule...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So the time really came to use that Time Capsule...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even when I first heard how to use it, I wondered why we were bringing such a troublesome Artifact along.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even when I first heard how to use it, I wondered why we were bringing such a troublesome Artifact along.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even when I first heard how to use it, I wondered why we were bringing such a troublesome Artifact along.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The one who told me about the time machine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The one who told me about the time machine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The one who told me about the time machine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That person probably knows Felix somehow. They smelled similar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That person probably knows Felix somehow. They smelled similar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That person probably knows Felix somehow. They smelled similar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...We may be dancing in the palm of their hand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...We may be dancing in the palm of their hand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...We may be dancing in the palm of their hand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What was that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What was that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What was that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, make sure your Watches are fully stocked with Eternium.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, make sure your Watches are fully stocked with Eternium.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, make sure your Watches are fully stocked with Eternium.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter what decision Team Sun makes, we'll have to break through the dimensional tunnel ourselves.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter what decision Team Sun makes, we'll have to break through the dimensional tunnel ourselves.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter what decision Team Sun makes, we'll have to break through the dimensional tunnel ourselves.
